{{Quote|Rogues. Somebody just sucked ''Champ''{{'s}} shields. Get clear!|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Gavin Darklighter]], during the fighting over Kalarba|<ref name="Balance" />}}
'''''Champion''''', also referred to as '''''Champ''''', was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]] that operated during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. ''Champion'' was under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[Brevet]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Glie'oleg Kru]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], when the 850-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] protected a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] fleeing the doomed [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]] as it [[Battle of Kalarba|came under]] attack from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. During the [[Realspace/Legends|space battle]] in the [[Kalarba system/Legends|Kalarba system]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[Yo'gand's Core|used]] a [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]-manipulating [[dovin basal]] to send [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] Kalarba, on a collision course with the planet. After the embattled ''Champion'' lost its [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]], the Bothan Assault Cruiser exploded due to the damage that it had [[Space warfare/Legends|sustained]], and the resulting detonation caught some New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and their [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] within the blast.

==Description==
''Champion''<ref name="Balance" /> was a 850-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long<ref name="Starships" /> [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]]<ref name="Balance" /> produced by the [[Bothawui Shipyards]].<ref name="Starships" /> The glossy-[[Hull/Legends|hulled]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] possessed a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]], multiple [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bays on the starboard side, and a propulsion section containing drive nacelles.<ref name="Balance" />

==History==
{{Quote|Rogues, more skips coming in at 349 mark 18. They're headed for ''Champ''{{'s}} drive nacelles.|Pilot Jaina Solo|<ref name="Balance" />}}
[[File:Kalarba.jpg|thumb|left|The ''Champion'' was destroyed at Kelaba (pictured) in 26 ABY.]]
Operational during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], when the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], ''Champion'' was utilized by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in its defense efforts during the war. Sometimes referred to as ''Champ'' by starfighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], ''Champion'' was commanded by [[Brevet]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Glie'oleg Kru]]<ref name="Balance" /> in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],<ref name="Reader" /> when the Bothan Assault Cruiser [[Battle of Kalarba|covered]] the retreat of [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that fled from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]. The Yuuzhan Vong had [[Yo'gand's Core|placed]] a [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]-manipulating [[dovin basal]] on the surface of Kalarba, pulling the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]] out of [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around Kalarba and sending it crashing into the world. While the pilots of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and other [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] [[Starfighter combat/Legends|engaged]] the enemy [[Yorik-et|coral skippers]] that were swarming ''Champion'' and targeting sections like the cruiser's drive nacelles, the Bothan Assault Cruiser was [[Space warfare/Legends|attacked]] by a newly-arrived Yuuzhan Vong [[Unidentified Yuuzhan Vong capital ship|capital ship]] that was slightly smaller than a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].<ref name="Balance" />

To make matters worse, the Yuuzhan Vong forces stripped ''Champion'' of its [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]],<ref name="Balance" /> and the [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] fired at the cruiser from the enemy [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] soon caused ''Champion''{{'s}}<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|118|''Champion''}}</ref> engines to explode. The interior explosion caused cracks on the exterior of the ship through which light shone, and the Bothan Assault Cruiser then exploded entirely.<ref name="Balance" /> The resulting blast engulfed some members of Rogue Squadron,<ref name="TCSWE" /> with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] pilot [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] sustaining serious [[Magnetic field/Legends|magnetic field]] exposure after she was ejected from her crippled [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]], leaving her temporarily blind.<ref name="Balance" />

==Commanders and crew==
The Bothan Assault Cruiser was commanded by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] Brevet Admiral Glie'oleg Kru, who was new to the post in 26 ABY.<ref name="Balance" /> He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when ''Champion'' exploded.<ref name="Kru">{{CSWECite|II|233|Kru, Gle'oleg}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
''Champion'' first appeared in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] novel [[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point|''Balance Point'']], which was written by [[Kathy Tyers]] and released in [[2000]].<ref name="Balance" />
